note: Maps ruff rule IDs to Lich M-engine categories. Updated at each major ruff release. Phase 1 covers ~120 of ruff's ~900 rules; remaining rules are tagged 'phase-2-coverage-gap' until the mapping expands. Security rules in the S-series (bandit-derived) are deliberately NOT mapped — those belong to Hydra R3.

correctness_m1.description: Rules that flag runtime-failure candidates — routed through M1 (abstract interpretation validates) and potentially M5 (sandbox confirms).

idiom_m7.description: Style and idiom rules — routed through M7 rubric (Idiom-fit axis).

naming_m7.description: Naming convention rules → M7 rubric (Clarity axis).

hydra_overlap_skip.description: Security rules — Hydra R3 owns these. Lich-python detects the rule fired but does NOT emit a finding (Hydra will have its own record).

phase_2_coverage_gap_note: The ~780 un-mapped ruff rules are mostly sub-category refinements (specific pyflakes variants, docstring style checks, import ordering). Phase 2 expands mapping as real review data shows which rules developers care about.
